title: Potassium
description: Performance modpack focused on stability and looks.
body:
# Welcome to Potassium
A fabric/sodium replacement modpack for optifine, with some QoL mods and better performance.
## Some of the goals with this modpack are:
- Parity with Optifine as much as possible
- SImplicity
- Stay with the latest mod and MC versions
 - Stay open to community recommendations and suggestions
This modpack was previously know as optisodium
Currently there's no issue tracker or wiki page.

For my resource pack click [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dls-creeper).

And Great Thanks to the developers of:

[Motschen's Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-leaves) Resource Pack

[Axolotl Bucket Variants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/axolotl-bucket-variants) Resource Pack

[Universal Multi-Stone Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/universal-multi-stone-ores) Resource Pack

[NobleRT](https://modrinth.com/shader/noblert) Shader

[VanilAA](https://modrinth.com/shader/vanillaa) Shader
#### Hope you enjoy the modpack.
